name: Turkey 'sausage', sweet potato & Italian veg
steps: Roast the sweet potato at 200°C (400°F) until tender.
Mix the ground turkey with the Italian 'sausage' seasoning blend and cook in the olive oil, breaking it up, until browned.
Steam or microwave the Italian veg blend.
Plate the turkey and sweet potato over lettuce with the veg alongside.

ingredients.name: Green Giant Valley Selections Italian blend
